raw_consumer_statement:
I was charged XXXX on my American Express card by a credit bureau XXXX I did not authorize this charge. It has already been reviewed by your agency and closed. 
I am reopening this because I had the same thing happen with my XXXX account and that was resolved in my favor. This is the exact same thing with American Express. I have no intentions of paying this fraud. If it were legitimate I would have been receiving services for my XXXX. I have received nothing. 
Please help me with this issue. I never authorized this transaction.
